args.code: (() => { try { const data = localStorage.getItem('farm_game_save_v1'); if (!data) return {error: 'NO_SAVE'}; const game = JSON.parse(data); const keys = Object.keys(game); return {keys: keys.slice(0, 50), day: game.day, season: game.season, money: game.money, stamina: game.stamina, maxStamina: game.maxStamina, health: game.health, maxHealth: game.maxHealth, fields: game.fields ? game.fields.length : 0, eventHistory: game.eventHistory ? (Array.isArray(game.eventHistory) ? game.eventHistory.length : (typeof game.eventHistory === 'object' ? Object.keys(game.eventHistory).length : game.eventHistory)) : 0, skills: game.skills, npcCount: game.friendship ? Object.keys(game.friendship).length : 0, npcs: game.friendship ? Object.keys(game.friendship).map(k => ({key: k, value: game.friendship[k]})) : [], reputation: game.reputation, mood: game.mood, mode: game.mode, questsCompleted: game.quests ? Object.values(game.quests).filter(v => v).length : 0, totalHarvest: game.stats ? game.stats.totalHarvest : 0, totalSell: game.stats ? game.stats.totalSell : 0, daysPlayed: game.daysPlayed, storageCapacity: game.storageCapacity, gameSpeed: game.gameSpeed, lastSave: game.lastSaveTimestamp, hasPets: game.pets ? Object.keys(game.pets).filter(k => game.pets[k].petToday !== undefined || game.pets[k].affection !== undefined).length : 0, workers: game.hiredWorker ? 1 : 0, fishPond: game.buildings ? !!game.buildings.fishPond : false, milestones: game.milestones ? Object.keys(game.milestones).length : 0, researchPoints: game.researchPoints, items: game.items, seeds: game.seeds, buildings: game.buildings ? Object.keys(game.buildings) : [], tools: game.tools ? game.tools.length : 0, house: game.house, rawLength: data.length}; } catch(e) { return {error: e.message}; } })()
